relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Prayer prompts the request: teach us to pray.
Prayer begins with Father, holy name, and coming reign.
Daily need is brought as bread.
Release received and release given are joined, with protection in testing.
Midnight friendship exposes need.
Hospitality has nothing to set before the guest.
The closed door resists rising.
Shameless persistence opens what friendship alone may not.
Ask, seek, and knock are active trust.
Receiving, finding, and opening answer the movement.
A father does not answer fish with serpent.
Nor egg with scorpion.
The Father gives holy Spirit to those asking.
A speech-binding force leaves and the man speaks.
Some mislabel release as Beelzebul’s power.
Others demand a heavenly sign as test.
A divided reign collapses.
The adversarial field cannot stand by undoing itself.
Their own exorcists become witnesses.
The finger of the Divine reveals the reign has come upon them.
The strong one guards the courtyard until stronger power arrives.
The stronger one removes the armor of false trust.
Scattering and gathering reveal alignment.
An unclean force seeks rest in empty places.
An ordered but empty house remains vulnerable.
Without true filling, the return can become worse.
A woman blesses the womb and breasts that carried him.
Jesus blesses hearing and keeping the word.
The sign-seeking generation is offered Jonah.
The Son of Humanity becomes the sign to the generation.
The queen of the South witnesses wisdom sought from afar.
Nineveh witnesses turning at Jonah’s proclamation.
A lamp belongs on the stand where it gives light.
The eye determines whether the body fills with light or darkness.
Watch that inner light is not darkness.
A fully lit body shines like a lamp.
A Pharisee invites him to dine.
The host marvels over washing.
Jesus turns from outer cleansing to inner greed and harm.
The Maker of outside also made inside.
Mercy-giving from within cleanses the whole.
Tithing herbs while passing by justice and divine love is woe-worthy.
Status seats and public greetings expose distorted desire.
Unseen tombs contaminate without awareness.
A lawyer feels the rebuke reach him too.
Lawyers load burdens they do not touch.
Building prophet tombs can mask continuity with prophet rejection.
The works of the fathers are witnessed and approved.
Wisdom sends prophets and sent ones into opposition.
The blood of prophets is required from the generation.
From Abel to Zechariah, the pattern is named.
Taking the key of knowledge blocks entry for self and others.
Opposition tightens as he leaves.
They lie in wait for a word from his mouth.
